title: Bob Chandler
compiled_truth: Bob Chandler is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-25), Bob Chandler sent 33 and received 276 emails, totalling 309 interactions. Top correspondents: [Rod Hayslett](people/rod-hayslett) (20), [James Saunders](people/james-saunders) (17), [Harry Walters](people/harry-walters) (11), [Tracy Geaccone](people/tracy-geaccone) (10), [Gary Zahn](people/gary-zahn) (9).
